label: Instana
description: Connect to IBM Instana to query APM metrics, traces, infrastructure data, and alerts via the Instana REST API.

form.title: Connect Instana
form.subtitle: Paste your Instana base URL and API token to give Anton access to your observability data.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your Instana tenant base URL and an API token from Team Settings. The simplest and most common way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with an Instana API Token

Instana issues scoped API tokens you can create and revoke from your tenant's settings panel.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Instana tenant (e.g. `https://unit-tenant.instana.io`).
2. Navigate to **Settings → Team Settings → API Tokens**.
3. Click **Add API Token**.
4. Give it a recognisable name like `Anton`.
5. Assign the scopes Anton needs — at minimum **canViewLogs**, **canViewTraceDetails**, **canViewInfrastructure**, and **canViewApplications**. Add alert and configuration read scopes if you want Anton to query those.
6. Click **Save** and copy the generated token — it is shown in full only at creation time.
7. Paste your tenant base URL (e.g. `https://unit-tenant.instana.io`) and the token into the fields below.

### Notes

- The token is a long opaque string; store it safely — you cannot retrieve it again from the UI.
- If you need to rotate the token, generate a new one in Team Settings, update Anton, then delete the old token.
- Self-hosted (on-prem) Instana units use a custom domain — use that domain as your base URL instead.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Instana Base URL
fields.description: Your tenant URL, e.g. https://unit-tenant.instana.io — no trailing slash needed.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Generated in Settings → Team Settings → API Tokens. Shown once at creation — copy it immediately.
